description: Single-module AGP app. The qodana.yaml bootstrap accepts SDK licenses and installs platforms;android-34 (the compile SDK). A Qodana scan is an IDE Gradle model import + inspections (not a build), so THIS fixture's scan needs no build-tools/aapt2. Validates qodana-android end to end: build + bootstrap + AGP import + analysis producing SARIF, with plugins loaded cleanly. Network on (android's accepted cost). The scan reliably flags an unstable Gradle/AGP DSL API in the Kotlin build script settings.gradle.kts as UnstableApiUsage (driver QDJVM — qodana-android reuses the qodana-jvm dist). Deeper AndroidLint app-code assertions (HardcodedText/ContentDescription) are QD-11439.

expectations.reason: qodana-android analyzes the project's Kotlin build script and flags an unstable Gradle/AGP DSL API in settings.gradle.kts as UnstableApiUsage. Confirmed from the QD-15247 CI control run (PR #108: 4x on settings.gradle.kts, driver QDJVM, on both amd64 and arm64). AndroidLint app-code depth is QD-11439.
